procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1135
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1135 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: File Explorer Folder Opened Using Explorer Folder Shortcut Via Shell

osquery.name: t1135_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery.name: t1135_net_enum
osquery.query_text: SELECT interface, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE interface != 'lo';
